# Gates of Olympus 1000 Malaysia

> Free online gates of olympus game for Malaysian players. No download, no registration. Play instantly in your browser.

## About This Game

Gates of Olympus 1000 Malaysia is a free browser-based gates of olympus game designed for Malaysian players.

- **Live Game**: https://johmark2026-svg.github.io/gates-of-olympus-1000-malaysia/
- **Strategy Guide**: https://www.birdsdot.com/gates-of-olympus-1000-malaysia/gates-of-olympus-1000-malaysia.html
- **Source Code**: https://github.com/johmark2026-svg/gates-of-olympus-1000-malaysia

## How to Play

Set your bet per spin, then click SPIN. Match 3 symbols for a big win, or 2 matching symbols for a smaller prize. Higher value symbols pay more!

- **Compatibility**: All modern browsers, mobile and desktop
